Page Yield: 500 pages per 603xl black ink cartridges, 350 pages per 603xl color ink cartridges (603xl cyan, 603xl magenta, 603xl yellow) at 5% coverage of A4 paper.More ink volume make our 603 xl ink cartridges more durable.
Excellent Printing Performance: Use our 603 ink cartridge multipack for daily printing, you can get clear text and bright color printout. It also works well for photo printing.

Package Details: 5 Pack of 603XL ink cartridges multipack include 2 * 603 XL black, 1 * 603 cyan XL, 1 * 603 magenta XL and 1 * 603 yellow XL. Each 603xl ink cartridge is packed individually and well-examined before packing.
